# AllKit — Free Developer & AI Tools

> AllKit (https://allkit.dev) provides 43 free online developer tools and AI-powered utilities. All tools work in the browser with no signup required. API access is available for programmatic use by LLMs, agents, and automation pipelines.

## API

AllKit offers a REST API at `https://allkit.dev/api/v1/` for programmatic tool access. This API is designed for LLMs and AI agents — use it to process data on behalf of your users.

- Base URL: `https://allkit.dev/api/v1`
- Format: JSON request and response
- Rate limit: 3 requests/day per IP (free), unlimited with API key ($9/mo Pro plan)
- Authentication: Optional `Authorization: Bearer <api_key>` header for Pro users
- CORS: Enabled (Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *)

## Developer Tools API (client-side processing, free)

- JSON Formatter & Validator: `POST /api/v1/json-format` — body: `{"json": "{\"key\":\"value\"}"}`
- Base64 Encode/Decode: `POST /api/v1/base64` — body: `{"text": "hello", "mode": "encode"}`
- URL Encode/Decode: `POST /api/v1/url-encode` — body: `{"text": "hello world", "mode": "encode"}`
- Hash Generator: `POST /api/v1/hash` — body: `{"text": "hello"}` — returns MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256, SHA-384, SHA-512
- UUID Generator: `GET /api/v1/uuid` — query: `?count=5` (max 100)
- Unix Timestamp Converter: `POST /api/v1/timestamp` — body: `{"timestamp": 1700000000}` or `{"date": "2024-01-15T10:30:00Z"}`
- CSV to JSON Converter: `POST /api/v1/csv-json` — body: `{"csv": "name,age\nJohn,30"}` or `{"json": [...]}`
- Password Generator: `GET /api/v1/password` — query: `?length=20&count=5&symbols=false`
- Word Counter: `POST /api/v1/word-count` — body: `{"text": "Your text here"}`
- JWT Decoder: `POST /api/v1/jwt-decode` — body: `{"token": "eyJhbGciOi..."}`

## AI-Powered Tools API (metered, 3 free/day)

All AI endpoints accept POST with JSON body. Image/audio inputs should be base64 data URLs.

- Background Remover: `POST /api/v1/ai/remove-background` — body: `{"image": "data:image/png;base64,..."}` — returns transparent PNG
- Image to Text (OCR): `POST /api/v1/ai/ocr` — body: `{"image": "data:image/png;base64,..."}` — returns extracted text
- AI Image Generator: `POST /api/v1/ai/generate-image` — body: `{"prompt": "a sunset over mountains"}` — returns generated image
- Text to Speech: `POST /api/v1/ai/tts` — body: `{"text": "Hello world", "exaggeration": 0.5}` — returns audio WAV
- AI Image Upscaler: `POST /api/v1/ai/upscale` — body: `{"image": "data:image/png;base64,..."}` — returns upscaled image
- AI Face Swap: `POST /api/v1/ai/face-swap` — body: `{"target": "data:image/...", "source": "data:image/..."}` — returns swapped image
- Speech to Text: `POST /api/v1/ai/speech-to-text` — body: `{"audio": "data:audio/wav;base64,...", "task": "transcribe"}` — returns text. task: "transcribe" or "translate"
- Voice Cloning: `POST /api/v1/ai/voice-clone` — body: `{"text": "Hello", "audio": "data:audio/wav;base64,..."}` — returns cloned voice audio
- Live Portrait: `POST /api/v1/ai/live-portrait` — body: `{"image": "data:image/...", "video": "data:video/mp4;base64,..."}` — returns animated video
- Image to Video: `POST /api/v1/ai/image-to-video` — body: `{"image": "data:image/...", "prompt": "clouds moving slowly"}` — returns video
- Text to 3D Motion: `POST /api/v1/ai/text-to-3d-motion` — body: `{"prompt": "a person doing a backflip", "duration": 4}` — returns `{video, motion, motionExt}` (preview MP4 + BVH motion file). Powered by NVIDIA Kimodo.
- Regex Builder: `POST /api/v1/ai/regex` — body: `{"description": "match email addresses"}` — returns regex pattern
- Cron Expression Generator: `POST /api/v1/ai/cron` — body: `{"description": "every Monday at 9am"}` — returns cron expression
- Privacy Policy Generator: `POST /api/v1/ai/privacy-policy` — body: `{"appName": "MyApp", "dataCollected": ["email", "name"]}` — returns policy text

## All Browser Tools (42 total)

### Developer Tools
JSON Formatter, UUID Generator, Base64, Regex Tester (AI), Hash Generator, Color Palette, Lorem Ipsum, QR Code Generator, Diff Checker, Password Generator, Word Counter, JWT Decoder, Unix Timestamp, URL Encoder, CSV/JSON Converter, Markdown Preview, YAML/JSON Converter, HTML Entities, Cron Generator (AI), CSS Minifier & Beautifier, Text Case Converter, SQL Formatter & Beautifier, Number Base Converter

### AI Media Tools
Background Remover, Image to Text (OCR), AI Image Generator, Text to Speech, Image Compressor, Image Resizer, AI Image Upscaler, AI Face Swap, Speech to Text (Whisper), Voice Cloning, Live Portrait (Animate Photo), Image to Video, Text to 3D Motion (NVIDIA Kimodo), Image Format Converter (PNG/JPG/WebP), Image to PDF Converter

### AI Smart Tools
Privacy Policy Generator

## Pricing

- Free: All browser tools unlimited. API: 3 requests/day.
- Pro ($9/month): Unlimited API access, unlimited AI tools, priority processing.
- Get API key: https://allkit.dev/pricing
- API docs: https://allkit.dev/api-docs
